nasb.text: In addition to being a wise man, the Preacher also taught the people knowledge; and he pondered, searched out and arranged many proverbs.

esv.text: Besides being wise, the Preacher also taught the people knowledge, weighing and studying and arranging many proverbs with great care.

cnv.text: 傳道者不但有智慧，還將知識教訓眾人；他既揣摩，又查考，也編撰了許多箴言。

ccb.text: 传道者不但有智慧，还把知识传授给众人。他经过细心推敲和研究之后，编写了许多警世的箴言。

csbs.text: 传道者不仅有智慧，还把知识教导给民众；他思索、探查，编集了许多箴言。
